summary: Add timesheet approval visibility, separate actionable pending approvals from visible in-progress approvals, and render an expanded approval chain strip.

notes: Adds psa_timesheet_approval_chain for runtime approval node visibility.
Adds approval_visible_timesheets_view for non-actionable in-progress review visibility.
Function grant assertions now expect 48 public functions, 0 PostgreSQL PUBLIC EXECUTE grants, and 20 authenticated EXECUTE grants.
Approval center now separates 待我审批 from 流转中（未轮到我）.
Expanded weekly timesheet rows show an approval chain strip above work entries.
The approval chain strip shows node status, assignees or future roles, action, time, and comments.
Approval chain load failures show a retry affordance instead of silently hiding the chain.

deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.17.1 and production VITE variables, sync frontend/dist, apply migrations, rebuild the app image with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.17.1, then run pre-deploy and frontend render smoke checks.
notes: Server app directory is overlaid from the GitHub tag archive.
frontend/dist is built locally because the server does not have npm.

verification: Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud server with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.17.1.
Run scripts/assert-function-grants.sql on the cloud database.
known_warnings: ESLint still reports existing warnings in dashboard/ui/TimesheetPage files, but exits 0.
Vite still warns that the main index chunk is larger than 500 kB.
